{{Infobox location
| name = Wasteland
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Reigan Shen]] emerges onto the blighted rock of the Wastelands.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c14">''Bloodline'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The Wastelands contain a fortified citadel frozen in time.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c5">''Dreadgod'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Wasteland]] contains long-abandoned battlefields.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c7">''Dreadgod'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
